entries.title: CrowdStrike Global Threat Report 2025
entries.description: Annual threat landscape report covering adversary trends, intrusion tradecraft, and emerging attack techniques observed across CrowdStrike's global telemetry.

entries.title: Mandiant M-Trends 2025
entries.description: Annual report on the latest cybersecurity threats, attacker trends, dwell time statistics, and incident response metrics from Mandiant's frontline investigations.

entries.title: Microsoft Digital Defense Report 2025
entries.description: Comprehensive annual report on the global threat landscape, nation-state activity, cybercrime trends, and Microsoft's defense recommendations.

entries.title: IBM X-Force Threat Intelligence Index 2025
entries.description: Annual analysis of cyber threats observed by IBM X-Force, including top attack vectors, ransomware trends, and industry-specific threat data.

entries.title: SonicWall Cyber Threat Report 2025
entries.description: Annual report detailing global cyber threat volume, malware trends, encrypted threats, and ransomware activity across SonicWall's sensor network.

entries.title: Verizon Data Breach Investigations Report 2025
entries.description: The definitive annual analysis of security incidents and data breaches based on real-world forensic investigations from Verizon and contributing partners.

entries.title: Proofpoint State of the Phish 2025
entries.description: Annual report on phishing trends, user awareness, social engineering tactics, and email-based threats based on global telemetry and user simulations.

entries.title: Cisco Talos Year in Review 2025
entries.description: Annual retrospective on the year's most significant threats, adversary campaigns, and cybersecurity trends observed by Cisco Talos.

entries.title: MITRE ATT&CK Framework
entries.description: Globally accessible knowledge base of adversary tactics, techniques, and procedures based on real-world observations. The industry-standard framework for cyber threat intelligence.

entries.title: NIST Cybersecurity Framework (CSF 2.0)
entries.description: Voluntary framework of cybersecurity standards, guidelines, and best practices for managing cybersecurity risk across all sectors.

entries.title: CIS Controls v8
entries.description: Prioritized set of 18 cybersecurity best practices and safeguards to protect organizations against the most common cyber threats.

entries.title: Cyber Kill Chain (Lockheed Martin)
entries.description: Intelligence-driven defense model for identifying and preventing cyber intrusions. Seven phases from reconnaissance to actions on objectives.

entries.title: Unified Kill Chain
entries.description: Extended kill chain framework integrating the Cyber Kill Chain, MITRE ATT&CK, and other models into a comprehensive 18-phase attack lifecycle.

entries.title: Diamond Model of Intrusion Analysis
entries.description: Analytical framework for intrusion analysis that models cyber events through four core features: adversary, capability, infrastructure, and victim.

entries.title: STRIDE Threat Model
entries.description: Threat classification framework: Spoofing, Tampering, Repudiation, Information Disclosure, Denial of Service, and Elevation of Privilege.

entries.title: D3FEND Matrix
entries.description: Knowledge graph of defensive cybersecurity countermeasures mapped to MITRE ATT&CK techniques. Standardizes the vocabulary and relationships of defensive techniques.

entries.title: OWASP Top 10 (2025)
entries.description: The standard awareness document for web application security. Lists the top 10 most critical web application security risks with examples and prevention guidance.

entries.title: SANS Top 25 Security Errors
entries.description: List of the most dangerous software errors identified by SANS — common programming mistakes that lead to serious security vulnerabilities.

entries.title: CWE Top 25 Most Dangerous Weaknesses
entries.description: The most widespread and critical software weaknesses identified by MITRE CWE. Prioritized by frequency and severity of exploitation.

entries.title: OWASP ASVS v4
entries.description: Application Security Verification Standard — framework of security requirements and verification levels for designing, building, and testing secure applications.

entries.title: SANS Cyber Aces
entries.description: Free online cybersecurity courses covering operating systems, networking, and system administration fundamentals for aspiring security professionals.

entries.title: TryHackMe
entries.description: Hands-on cybersecurity training platform with browser-based virtual machines. Learn by completing real-world security challenges and capture-the-flag rooms.

entries.title: Hack The Box
entries.description: Online cybersecurity training platform featuring realistic machines, CTF challenges, and penetration testing labs for skill development.

entries.title: PentesterLab
entries.description: Web application security training platform providing vulnerable exercises across common web vulnerabilities with hands-on exploit development.

entries.title: AttackIQ Academy
entries.description: Free cybersecurity training platform focused on adversary emulation, purple teaming, and breach and attack simulation (BAS) methodologies.

entries.title: DetectionStream
entries.description: Platform for learning detection engineering and SIEM content development. Offers workshops, courses, and community resources for building detection logic.

entries.title: Threat Hunting Labs
entries.description: Hands-on threat hunting practice platform with real-world datasets and guided hunting exercises across different attack scenarios and data sources.

entries.title: BlueTeamLabs Online
entries.description: Blue team and DFIR training platform with SOC simulation scenarios, incident response challenges, and forensic investigation labs.
